case_title: TACTICAL TELESOLUTIONS, INC. VS. ADVANCED VISUAL SYSTEMS, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16311022) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-21-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
